title: Unique Crunchy Korean Rice Fried Rice
description: A fatty and shaggy Korean dish from Busan featuring rice krispies and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients, this recipe is perfect for those looking for a light and crunchy meal.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Add the soy sauce, ghee, and sesame seeds to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the rice krispies to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the rice krispies are lightly toasted.
Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the chopped scallions and salt.
Serve the Unique Crunchy Korean Rice Fried Rice hot.
